about.title: About Tax Refund Calculator
about.desc: DopaBrain Tax Refund Calculator estimates your year-end tax refund in just 1 minute. Enter salary, insurance, card spending, medical, education, and pension data across 19 input fields to get your estimated refund with tax-saving tips. Completely free.
about.howTitle: How to Calculate Your Tax Refund
about.howDesc: Enter your basic info (salary, dependents) and insurance is auto-calculated. Add card spending, medical, education, and pension data to see your estimated refund with personalized tax-saving tips.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: This calculator provides estimates based on tax laws. For exact results, please use your country's official tax service. Results are for reference purposes only.
faq.a2: It supports 19 input fields including social insurance (auto-calculated), credit/debit card spending, traditional market, public transport, housing savings, mortgage interest, medical, education, donations, insurance premiums, pension savings, IRP, and monthly rent.
faq.a3: All calculations happen in your browser. No personal data is sent to any server. Your information stays completely on your device.
faq.a4: When you enter your salary, national pension (4.5%), health insurance (3.545%), long-term care, and employment insurance (0.9%) are auto-calculated. You can manually adjust if actual amounts differ.
faq.a5: Yes, you can share your results via social media or copy the link. No personal data is included in shared results, so your privacy is protected.
